text: Aaj team meeting mein Boss ne sabke samne meri bezatti ki aur layoff ki dhamki di, tab se mera dimaag ekdum sunn pad gaya hai. Hostel ke kamre mein baith kar bas roye ja raha hoon, na khane ka hosh hai na aage kya karna hai kuch samajh aa raha. Itna bura lag raha hai ki lagta hai sab kuch khatam ho gaya, bas ek gehra dard mehsus ho raha hai.

Meeting mein Boss ke chillaane ke baad se main itni zyada overwhelmed hoon ki bas ek kone mein baithi hoon, dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai. Papa ne kisan hokar apni sari jama-pungi meri padhai mein laga di thi, aur ab is humiliation ke baad mujhe sirf rona aa raha hai. Kuch bhi sochna namumkin lag raha hai, bas ek ajeeb sa darr baith gaya hai dimaag mein.

Boss ne sabke samne nikalne ki baat kahi toh mera dil itni buri tarah toot gaya ki bed se uthne ki himmat nahi ho rahi. JEE dropout hone ke baad ye internship hi mera sahara thi, par ab main poori tarah emotional flooding ka shikar hoon. Samajh hi nahi aa raha ki is dukh se kaise niklun, bas baar-baar wahi baatein dimaag mein goonj rahi hain.

Aaj ki meeting ke baad se main itna ghut raha hoon ki saans lena bhi bojh lag raha hai, dimaag mein bas wahi taane chal rahe hain. Ghar ki EMI aur kirana shop ka karz kaise chukega ye baad ki baat hai, pehle ye jo rona ruk nahi raha usne mujhe tod diya hai. Is waqt main koi solution dhoondne ke layak hi nahi bacha, bas lag raha hai ki main sabke liye ek bojh hoon.

Boss ne team ke samne mere kaam ko kachra bol diya aur tabhi se main bas sunn hokar leti hoon, na bhook lag rahi hai na pyaas. MNC ki ye job mere parivaar ki 'izzat' thi, par ab is humiliation ne mujhe itna flood kar diya hai ki main laptop kholne ki soch bhi nahi sakti. Main bas ek loop mein fasa hoon jahan sirf dard aur nakami mehsus ho rahi hai.
